name: Walnut Praline Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup walnuts, toasted and finely chopped
1/3 cup firmly packed dark brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 300°F. Combine the crumbs, walnuts, sugar, and margarine in a bowl until well mixed. Press into a 9-inch springform pan.
In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk, then eggs and vanilla, beating until smooth. Pour the mixture into the pan.
Bake for 55 minutes or until the center is set. Cool completely. Top with Walnut Praline Topping and refrigerate leftovers.
Walnut Praline Topping: In a saucepan, combine 1/3 cup each of firmly packed dark brown sugar and whipping cream. Cook and stir until the sugar dissolves. Simmer for 5 minutes or until thickened. Add 1/2 cup chopped toasted walnuts.
